---
name: gitops-security-gates
description: Enforce PR test gates, secure merge policy, and trusted publishing readiness.
---

# GitOps security gates skill

Use this skill when tasks involve:

- PR validation and merge gating;
- owner-only automation for approval/merge;
- trusted publishing and release hardening;
- branch protection/ruleset verification.

Expected outputs:

- CI gate matrix (`analyze`, `unit`, `integration`, `e2e`);
- merge policy outcome and automation configuration;
- security posture summary for publish readiness;
- explicit blocked items when GitHub plan/API limitations prevent ruleset changes.
